title: Stakeholders hail WAEC over proactive steps in addressing result portal glitches - FinancialEDGE
description: Encomiums have continued to pour in for the West African Examinations Council (WAEC) after it proactively resolved the technical glitches on its results portal on Friday. The downtime occurred shortly after the official release of the 2025 West African Senior School Certificate Examination (WASSCE) on Monday, August 4, 2025. The timely intervention by
html: Encomiums have continued to pour in for the West African Examinations Council (WAEC) after it proactively resolved the technical glitches on its results portal on Friday.
